notes: Registry BUILD classification is wrong — no application code was written. Session is entirely about designing and improving the Ralphy skill (SKILL.md edits in the plugin authoring repo). Key work: four-mode taxonomy (requirements/plan/build/extend), terminology canonicalisation (campaign=worktree=PR), startup directive pattern, and Project Heal capability. Also demonstrates cross-session transcript-review workflow for skill iteration. High AngelEye signal — David explicitly articulates skill discoverability requirements and 'lost learnings' pain point that is central to AngelEye's purpose.
